tools.name: getcustomers
tools.description: Returns a list of your customers. The customers are returned sorted by creation date, with the most recent customers appearing first. Returns: { object: string, data: array, has_more: boolean, url:...

limit.description: A limit on the number of objects to be returned. Limit can range between 1 and 100.

starting_after.description: A cursor for use in pagination.

ending_before.description: A cursor for use in pagination.

email.description: A case-sensitive filter on the list based on the customer's email field.

created[gt].description: Return results where the created field is greater than this value.

created[gte].description: Return results where the created field is greater than or equal to this value.

created[lt].description: Return results where the created field is less than this value.

created[lte].description: Return results where the created field is less than or equal to this value.

created.description: Time at which the object was created. Measured in seconds since the Unix epoch.

tools.name: postcustomers
tools.description: Creates a new customer object. Returns: { id: string, object: string, email: string, name: string, ... }

name.description: The customer's full name or business name.

description.description: An arbitrary string attached to the object.

metadata.description: Set of key-value pairs that you can attach to an object.

payment_method.description: The ID of the PaymentMethod to attach to the customer.

preferred_locales.description: Customer's preferred languages, ordered by preference.

created.description: Time at which the object was created. Measured in seconds since the Unix epoch.

tools.name: getcustomerscustomer
tools.description: Retrieves a Customer object. Returns: { id: string, object: string, email: string, name: string, ... }

created.description: Time at which the object was created. Measured in seconds since the Unix epoch.

tools.name: postcustomerscustomer
tools.description: Updates the specified customer by setting the values of the parameters passed. Returns: { id: string, object: string, email: string, name: string, ... }

created.description: Time at which the object was created. Measured in seconds since the Unix epoch.

tools.name: deletecustomerscustomer
tools.description: Permanently deletes a customer. Returns: { id: string, object: string, deleted: boolean }

tools.name: getcharges
tools.description: Returns a list of charges you've previously created. Returns: { object: string, data: array, has_more: boolean, url: string }

customer.description: Only return charges for the customer specified by this customer ID.

tools.name: postcharges
tools.description: Creates a new charge object. Returns: { id: string, object: string, amount: integer, amount_captured: integer, ... }

amount.description: Amount intended to be collected by this payment, in cents.

customer.description: The ID of an existing customer.

source.description: A payment source to be charged.

tools.name: getchargescharge
tools.description: Retrieve a charge. Returns: { id: string, object: string, amount: integer, amount_captured: integer, ... }

tools.name: postchargescharge
tools.description: Update a charge. Returns: { id: string, object: string, amount: integer, amount_captured: integer, ... }

tools.name: postchargeschargecapture
tools.description: Capture the payment of an existing, uncaptured charge. Returns: { id: string, object: string, amount: integer, amount_captured: integer, ... }

tools.name: getpaymentintents
tools.description: List all PaymentIntents. Returns: { object: string, data: array, has_more: boolean, url: string }

tools.name: postpaymentintents
tools.description: Creates a PaymentIntent object. Returns: { id: string, object: string, amount: integer, amount_received: integer, ... }

amount.description: Amount intended to be collected, in cents.

tools.name: getpaymentintentsintent
tools.description: Retrieve a PaymentIntent. Returns: { id: string, object: string, amount: integer, amount_received: integer, ... }

tools.name: postpaymentintentsintent
tools.description: Update a PaymentIntent. Returns: { id: string, object: string, amount: integer, amount_received: integer, ... }

tools.name: postpaymentintentsintentconfirm
tools.description: Confirm a PaymentIntent. Returns: { id: string, object: string, amount: integer, amount_received: integer, ... }

tools.name: postpaymentintentsintentcancel
tools.description: Cancel a PaymentIntent. Returns: { id: string, object: string, amount: integer, amount_received: integer, ... }

tools.name: getsubscriptions
tools.description: List subscriptions. Returns: { object: string, data: array, has_more: boolean, url: string }

tools.name: postsubscriptions
tools.description: Create a subscription. Returns: { id: string, object: string, customer: string, status: string, ... }

tools.name: getsubscriptionssubscriptionexposedid
tools.description: Retrieve a subscription. Returns: { id: string, object: string, customer: string, status: string, ... }

tools.name: postsubscriptionssubscriptionexposedid
tools.description: Update a subscription. Returns: { id: string, object: string, customer: string, status: string, ... }

tools.description: Cancel a subscription. Returns: { id: string, object: string, customer: string, status: string, ... }

tools.name: postinvoicesinvoice

unit_amount.description: A positive integer in cents representing how much to charge.
